source_basis: Owner direction: verified signup, manual/code-assisted bank-transfer approval, account-only web service, user-owned LLM/SNS/KIS tokens.

Supabase RLS guidance checked via Context7: enable RLS, use auth.uid() ownership policies, keep service/secret keys server-side only, use SECURITY DEFINER only with private schema and explicit search_path.
MEMBERSHIP-PAYMENT-EVIDENCE-POLICY.json defines minimal retained payment evidence fields, forbidden raw evidence, redaction rules, and audit invariants.
MEMBERSHIP-TENANT-ISOLATION-MATRIX.json defines route groups, tenant surfaces, auth.uid() ownership expectations, and required staging isolation tests.

MEMBERSHIP-PRODUCTION-SECRET-POLICY.json defines user-owned LLM/SNS/OAuth/KIS token categories, write-only API boundary, redaction, deletion, rotation, and audit invariants before production secret storage is implemented.

MEMBERSHIP-ENGINE-SAFETY-CONTRACT.json defines per-user engine state, queue, kill switch, risk limit, circuit breaker, order intent, log, and notification boundaries before live-readiness implementation.
non_goals: No production DB migration or schema apply in this contract.
No real bank account number, customer payment record, customer PII, or provider token in repository files.
No external deploy, payment provider, bank API, OAuth callback, KIS credential activation, or live order path change.
No public claim that Autofolio provides investment advice, guarantees returns, or operates user assets.

allowed_mechanisms: backend route using server-side secret key
reviewed SECURITY DEFINER function in private schema with explicit search_path
forbidden_mechanisms: SECURITY DEFINER function in public API schema without explicit search_path

security_invariants.statement: Every tenant-owned product, membership, secret-metadata, engine, safety, order-intent, and audit row must include a user_id or actor_user_id that references auth.users(id).
RLS must be enabled on every tenant-owned table before staging or production launch.
Member self-read/write policies must use auth.uid() equality against user_id or the table primary user id.
Owner/admin actions that affect another user must run through a server-side audited route or reviewed SECURITY DEFINER function.
LLM/SNS/KIS secret values are write-only at the API boundary and never returned to the browser after storage.
Supabase service role or secret keys must never be exposed to browser code, logs, reports, or repository files.
Payment evidence stores only minimal masked evidence, deposit code, amount, source type, and audit event reference; raw bank statements are not persisted by default.
Engine loop state, queues, risk limits, kill switch, and order intents must be user-scoped before external members can use live-readiness features.
Recommendation and agent-output surfaces must keep investment-advice, paid-signal, model-portfolio, and performance claims behind compliance and professional review.

entities.name: profiles
member_policies: select own profile where auth.uid() = id
insert own profile where auth.uid() = id
update own profile where auth.uid() = id

entities.name: membership_requests
member_policies: select own request where auth.uid() = user_id
insert initial request with auth.uid() = user_id after auth user creation or controlled pre-auth intake
entities.admin_policy: server audited owner/admin review and transition

entities.name: deposit_instructions
member_policies: select own deposit instruction where auth.uid() = user_id

entities.name: approval_events
member_policies: select own events where auth.uid() = target_user_id
entities.admin_policy: server audited append only; no update/delete except retention process

entities.name: subscription_grants
member_policies: select own grant where auth.uid() = user_id
entities.admin_policy: server audited owner/admin grant or revoke

entities.name: integration_secrets
member_policies: select own secret metadata only where auth.uid() = user_id
insert/update/delete own secret reference via backend route where auth.uid() = user_id
entities.admin_policy: no routine admin read of plaintext; deletion/rotation audited

entities.name: portfolio_accounts
member_policies: select own account where auth.uid() = user_id
update own non-admin display metadata only

entities.name: holdings_snapshots
member_policies: select own holdings where auth.uid() = user_id

entities.name: risk_settings
member_policies: select own risk settings where auth.uid() = user_id
update own allowed limits within server validation

entities.name: engine_state
member_policies: select own engine state where auth.uid() = user_id
update own requested run mode only through backend validation

entities.name: order_intents
member_policies: select own intents where auth.uid() = user_id
insert own intent only through backend risk gate

entities.name: audit_events
member_policies: select own events where auth.uid() = target_user_id or auth.uid() = actor_user_id
entities.admin_policy: server audited append only; retention policy required before delete

tenant_isolation_tests_future: member A cannot read or mutate member B data
service/admin action creates immutable audit event
secret write returns only metadata and masked hint
engine queue and kill switch are user scoped
supabase_staging_future: RLS enabled on all tenant-owned tables
SECURITY DEFINER functions have private schema and explicit search_path
service/secret key exists only in server-side environment
